sections.paragraph:
Original: חריף

Transliteration: chârı̂yph

Phonetic: khaw-reef'

BDB Definition:

Hariph = "a plucking off"
  1. head of a family of exiles returning with Zerubbabel
  2. a head of the people who sealed the covenant with Nehemiah

Origin: from H2778

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
